description: Merge-throughput baselines for parallel HTAP merge worker benchmarks (v0.76.0 BENCH-REFRESH-01).

conditions.notes: Baseline refreshed at v0.76.0 (BENCH-REFRESH-01). Previous baseline was v0.53.0 (18 releases behind). p50/p95 computed from 5 independent runs. Improvement reflects HTAP merge optimisations introduced in v0.54.0-v0.75.0 (multi-worker pipeline, BRIN summarise, delta compaction).

citus_bulk_load.description: Citus direct-shard bulk-load path vs coordinator routing (v0.61.0 CITUS-21).

coordinator_routing.notes: Coordinator-routed inserts on a 4-worker Citus cluster; baseline before CITUS-21.

conditions.hardware: 4-worker Citus cluster, 8-core workers with NVMe SSD
conditions.notes: Refreshed at v0.76.0. Measured on synthetic dataset; real-world improvement depends on network latency.
